input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.11.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.11.1
            TITLE: rain test requirements

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.11.1: Rain Test Requirements
IN.11.1 Rain Test Requirements 
• Tractive System must be Active 
• The vehicle must not be in Ready to Drive mode (EV.7) 
• Any driven wheels must not touch the ground 
• A driver must not be seated in the vehicle

final_answer: Rain Test Requirements • Tractive System must be Active • The vehicle must not be in Ready to Drive mode (EV.7) • Any driven wheels must not touch the ground • A driver must not be seated in the vehicle
